calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.subtitle: Check your expenses by day, week, and category

category.delete_blocked: Cannot delete this category because it has related expenses.

settings.subtitle: Manage and reset your app data.

currency.title: Currency
currency.subtitle: Set the currency used for expense amounts.

language.title: Language
language.subtitle: Choose the language used in the app.

reset.title: Reset all data
reset.subtitle: This action cannot be undone.
reset.dialog_content: Are you sure you want to delete all data?

account.login_subtitle: Sign in to enable upcoming cloud sync and backup features.
account.subtitle: Sign out of the currently logged-in account.
account.logout_confirm_content:
Are you sure you want to sign out?
If you have an active subscription, features will be restricted until you sign in again.
account.delete_subtitle: Permanently delete your cloud account and backup data.
account.delete_confirm_content:
Deleting your account removes the following data:

- Cloud account
- Cloud backup data
- Cloud transaction data
- Backup metadata

Local expense data on this device will not be deleted. To remove local data, use Reset all data in Settings.
account.delete_final_content:
Delete the account {email}?
This action cannot be undone. Continue?
account.delete_requires_recent_login: For security, sign in again and retry account deletion.
account.delete_failed: Failed to delete account. Please try again. ({code})

cloud_tx.title: Cloud Transactions (Firebase)
cloud_tx.subtitle: Test Firestore transaction CRUD for the signed-in user.
cloud_tx.login_required: Sign in to use this feature.

backup.title: Cloud Backup
backup.subtitle_login_required: Sign in to save snapshot backups to Firebase.
backup.subtitle: Back up local DB (expenses/categories) and settings as a snapshot (JSON).
backup.restore_hint: Restore only applies snapshots from the currently signed-in account to local data.

msg.login_required: Sign in first to use cloud backup.
msg.failed_retry: Backup failed. Check network status and try again.
msg.restore_login_required: Sign in first to use restore.
msg.restore_done: Restore completed: screen data has been refreshed.
msg.weekly_limit: You've already used your free backup this week. Subscribe for unlimited backups.
msg.daily_restore_limit: You've already restored today. The limit resets at midnight KST.

firebase.permission_denied: Permission denied. Check login state and security rules.
firebase.unauthenticated: Authentication expired. Sign in again and retry.
firebase.unavailable: Backup failed due to network connectivity.
firebase.resource_exhausted: Backup failed because storage quota was exceeded.
firebase.invalid_argument: Backup failed due to invalid data size or format.

cloud_tx.title: Cloud Transactions
cloud_tx.subtitle: Firestore transaction CRUD test screen
cloud_tx.empty: No cloud transactions for this month.

menu.subtitle: Detailed statistics and CSV/PDF reports are available.
menu.item_csv_subtitle: Export CSV by month or custom range

stats.title: Expense Statistics
stats.subtitle: Analyze monthly expenses by various criteria.
stats.empty_month: No expense data for this month.

auth.title: Sign In
auth.subtitle: Sign in with email to prepare cloud sync and backup.

signup.title: Create Account
signup.subtitle: Create an account to prepare for cloud features.
signup.agree_terms: I agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
signup.terms_required: You must agree to the terms to sign up.
signup.terms_content: This app uses account authentication to provide cloud sync and backup features. Stored data is processed for service functionality only.
signup.privacy_content: When email login or cloud sync is used, authentication and storage may be processed through Firebase. Please avoid entering sensitive personal information in memo fields.

error.invalid_email: Please enter a valid email address.
error.password_min: Password must be at least 6 characters.
error.user_not_found: No account found for this email.
error.email_already_in_use: This email is already in use.
error.email_password_not_enabled: Email/Password sign-in is disabled in Firebase Console.
error.account_exists_different_credential: An account already exists with a different sign-in method.
error.google_token_missing: Failed to get a Google sign-in token.

expense.add_hint: After saving, you can view it right away on Home.
expense.detail_hint: Tap Save to apply your changes.
expense.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this item?

payment_method.manage_subtitle: Manage your cards, cash, bank accounts, and mobile pay.
payment_method.delete_confirm:
Delete this payment method?
Past expenses will be kept.

recurring_expense.title: Fixed Expenses
recurring_expense.subtitle: Manage your recurring fixed expenses.
recurring_expense.deactivate_confirm:
Deactivate this fixed expense?
Already-generated expenses will be kept.
recurring_expense.delete_confirm:
Delete this fixed expense?
Already-generated expenses will be kept.
recurring_expense.end_date_before_start: End date cannot be before start date.

subscription.title: Subscription Plan
subscription.settings_nav_subtitle: View and manage your current subscription.
subscription.cancel_dialog_desc: Subscription cancellation is managed through Google Play. Go to the Play Store?
subscription.ios_free_desc: All features are currently free on iOS.
subscription.limit_recurring_msg:
Free plan allows up to 10 fixed expenses.
Subscribe to Cloud or Report plan for unlimited.
subscription.limit_payment_msg:
Free plan allows up to 5 payment methods.
Subscribe to Cloud or Report plan for unlimited.
subscription.ios_coming_soon_desc:
Subscription service for iOS is currently under preparation.
It will be available soon.

paywall.purchase_failed: Could not complete the payment. Please try again later.
paywall.restore_failed: Could not restore purchases. Please try again later.

cloud.title: Cloud Backup
cloud.description: Back up and restore your data to the cloud. Keep your data safe even when switching devices.

report.title: Statistics & Reports
report.description: Access monthly statistics and CSV/PDF export features.
